sections.paragraph:
(from the root נוּחַ), with suff. pl. מְנוּחַיִךְ ( Psa 116:7).-

(1) rest, Lam 1:3. To seek rest for a woman, i.e. “conditionem” (Liv. iii. 45); to seek marriage, Rth 3:1. Plur. Psa 116:7.

(2) a place of rest, Gen 8:9 Deu 28:65.

(3) [Manoah], pr.n. of the father of Samson, Jud. 13:2 , seq.
